notes: After receiving the error, the user is stuck in a loop. Upon starting the game from the main menu, a prompt appears stating that a sortie is in progress.  The only option is to reconnect to the failed sortie, which results in the same error, which returns the user to the main menu.  I have yet to play the game I purchased.  As I purchased the game from a store other than Steam, I am unable to refund it.
